blocks.html: This appendix provides guidance on the structure and content expected in a completed mathematical investigation paper. Students may refer to these samples when preparing their own investigations.

blocks.title: Sample Investigation Structure
items: Methodology: How data was collected, strategies employed, tools used
Findings and Analysis: Data tables, patterns observed, conjectures formulated
Justification and Proof: Mathematical reasoning, proofs, verification methods
Conclusions and Reflections: Summary of discoveries, challenges, what was learned
Extensions: New questions raised, directions for further investigation

blocks.html: Note: The actual sample papers from previous students are available from the instructor. This appendix serves as a structural guide for preparing your own investigation paper.
